name: hero
reason: Custom animated hero unique to Site 1's launch campaign, not needed by other sites.

name: header
reason: Site navigation and branding — inherently site-specific, not a candidate for sharing.

name: footer
reason: Site footer links and branding — inherently site-specific, not a candidate for sharing.

name: fragment
reason: scripts.js imports this via a hardcoded relative path (not the codeBasePath-driven block loader), so it structurally can't be federated without also patching scripts.js's fragment-loading logic.
